appTagline: A simple, practical web-based accounting tool

messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Thank you for using Easy Accounting 2.0 (hereinafter referred to as "this app"). We take your privacy seriously. Please read the following policy to understand how we handle your data:
privacy.section1_body: This app uses Progressive Web App (PWA) technology. All your accounting and account data is stored directly in your device's browser database (IndexedDB). Neither the developer nor any third-party server can actively access, view, or collect your personal accounting data.
privacy.section2_body: If you choose to enable the Cloud Backup & Sync feature, this app will request authorization via Google Identity Services to back up your data to your personal Google Drive hidden app folder. Backup data is only used for cross-device sync and restoration. The developer's server does not handle or access your Google Drive data.
privacy.section3_body_before: To sustain the operation and development of this app, we use Google AdMob and Google AdSense to serve advertisements. These third-party services may collect anonymous data about your device, IP address, and interactions with the app (such as cookies) to provide personalized or non-personalized ads. For information about their data collection and usage, please refer to the
privacy.section4_intro: Since data is primarily stored on your local device, if you wish to delete all accounting data, you can:
privacy.section4_option1: Clear website data (Cache, IndexedDB) directly through your browser settings
privacy.section4_option2: If you have used the Cloud Backup & Sync feature, you can remove this app's authorization under Google Account "Security > Third-party app access" and delete the app data from Google Drive.
privacy.section5_body: We reserve the right to modify this Privacy Policy at any time. Updates will not be individually notified. Your continued use of this app constitutes acceptance of the modified Privacy Policy.
